sentiment_score_definition: x <= -0.35: Bearish; -0.35 < x <= -0.15: Somewhat-Bearish; -0.15 < x < 0.15: Neutral; 0.15 <= x < 0.35: Somewhat_Bullish; x >= 0.35: Bullish
relevance_score_definition: 0 < x <= 1, with a higher score indicating higher relevance.

feed.title: Surf Air Mobility (SRFM) Is Up 19.0% After Q3 Beat, Outlook Hike And Palantir SurfOS Deal
feed.summary: Surf Air Mobility (SRFM) rose 19.0% after reporting strong Q3 2025 results, exceeding revenue guidance and raising its full-year outlook. The company also expanded its SurfOS software platform through a new partnership with Palantir, focusing on the regional air mobility segment. These developments led to a Zacks Rank #2 upgrade for SRFM, highlighting improved earnings estimates and a more positive outlook for both its airline business and software ambitions.

feed.title: China Sanctions Boeing, Other U.S. Companies Over Taiwan Arms Sale
feed.summary: China has imposed sanctions on 20 U.S. defense companies and 10 executives, including Boeing's defense unit and Anduril Industries founder Palmer Luckey. This move is in retaliation for the Trump administration's approval of a significant arms package for Taiwan. The sanctions target companies and individuals involved in the production and sale of weapons to Taiwan, reflecting Beijing's strong opposition to such deals.
